meta_title: For Students: passive income to Solve stuck with basic apps (Beginner Checklist)
meta_description: Learn how to passive income and overcome stuck with basic apps. A Beginner-level Checklist using Antigravity and Claude Code.
h2_structure: The Problem: stuck with basic apps

content.seo_title: For Students: Passive Income to Solve Stuck with Basic Apps
content.seo_description: Learn how to generate passive income and overcome being stuck with basic apps. A Beginner-level Checklist using Antigravity and Claude Code for students.
content.answer_block: Break your plateau by transitioning from simple tutorials to micro-SaaS products. By leveraging AI-assisted coding tools like Antigravity and Claude Code, you can rapidly deploy functional, revenue-generating tools. Focus on solving specific pain points for niche audiences, automate the delivery, and watch your portfolio and passive income grow simultaneously.
content.intro:
You have spent weeks building to-do lists and weather apps, yet your screen feels empty of real-world impact. The frustration of 'tutorial hell' is the invisible wall between a student and a professional developer. You are technically capable, but you lack the architecture to bridge the gap between simple code and a living, breathing product.

Today, we shatter that wall. By integrating AI-driven workflows into your build process, you will stop writing boilerplate and start shipping solutions. This checklist is your roadmap to building high-value micro-SaaS projects that don't just sit on GitHub, but actively generate passive income while you sleep.

steps.title: Identify a High-Value Micro-Niche
steps.description: Stop building generic tools. Use AI to find a specific, underserved market. Focus on 'pain-point' automation.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Analyze current trends in productivity SaaS and identify 5 underserved micro-niches where a simple AI-integrated web tool could solve a recurring manual task.
steps.claude_code_command: claude research --query 'market gaps for micro-saas productivity tools'

steps.title: Architect the MVP Structure
steps.description: Use Antigravity to scaffold a clean, scalable architecture that prevents technical debt from day one.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Generate a scalable folder structure for a Next.js 14 micro-SaaS with Supabase integration and Stripe billing, focusing on modular component design.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run --instruction 'scaffold project using the generated structure'

steps.title: Implement AI-Powered Logic
steps.description: Integrate LLM capabilities into your core workflow to provide unique value that makes users willing to pay.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Create a robust service layer that handles asynchronous prompts to the OpenAI API with error handling, rate limiting, and cost-efficient token management.
steps.claude_code_command: claude add --file src/services/aiService.ts --context 'implement robust error handling for LLM calls'

steps.title: Automate Billing and User Auth
steps.description: Secure your revenue stream by integrating Stripe and Auth providers early in the development lifecycle.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Write the boilerplate for Stripe Webhooks in an API route to handle subscription status updates and user authentication state syncing.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run --instruction 'integrate stripe webhooks into the existing auth flow'

steps.title: Deployment and Passive Monitoring
steps.description: Automate your CI/CD pipeline so updates are pushed without manual intervention, ensuring 99.9% uptime for your users.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Create a GitHub Actions workflow that runs tests, builds the app, and deploys to Vercel upon merging into the main branch.

pro_tips: Focus on 'Time-to-First-Dollar'—if your MVP takes more than 14 days to build, you are over-engineering.
Use Supabase Edge Functions to offload heavy compute tasks, keeping your primary app responsive and cheap to host.
Always include a 'Feedback Loop' widget; user suggestions are the best roadmap for future feature monetization.
Prioritize SEO-friendly static generation for your landing pages to ensure organic traffic finds your tool without ad spend.
Treat your codebase as a product—document your API endpoints as you build to make future maintenance trivial.
content.next_steps: Once your MVP is live, focus on acquiring your first 10 users through niche communities like Reddit or IndieHackers to validate your pricing model before scaling.
content.conversion_block: Stop dreaming of being a developer and start acting like a founder. The tools are ready, the market is waiting, and your portfolio needs a win. Ready to build? Join our AI Builder community → Start your first project today.
